'''ladhadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nympha|nympha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nympha|nympha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ladhadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || lædhædhæth || lædhædhæj || lædhædhæsh || lædhædhæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || ladhadhadhath || ladhadhadhaj || ladhadhadhash || ladhadhadha
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || ladhadhath || ladhadhaj || ladhadhash || ladhadha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || ladhafdhafth || ladhafdhafj || ladhafdhafsh || ladhafdhaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ladhadhatha || ladhadhaja || ladhadhasha || ladhadhaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || ladhadhath || ladhadhaj || ladhadhash || ladhadha
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ladhadhathal || ladhadhajal || ladhadhashal || ladhadhakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ladhadhaathatha || ladhadhaajaja || ladhadhaashasha || ladhadhaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || ladhadhathan || ladhadhajan || ladhadhashan || ladhadhakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ladhadhathaoro || ladhadhajaoro || ladhadhashaoro || ladhadhakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
